summary: ADR 0399/0400: Homepage reconverged — stale One-API and Open WebUI tiles removed, text selectability fixed, bookmarks fully catalog-driven.

verification.observed: One-API and Open WebUI tiles no longer appear on home.example.com; LibreChat tile present.
user-select: text !important CSS override applied; text can be selected and copied in browser.
Bookmark URLs resolved from service-capability-catalog.json, eliminating hardcoded localhost URLs.

notes: Fixed 3 cascading bugs: ADR 0373 service vars missing → Ansible untrusted template → hardcoded bookmark URLs.
Reconciliation daemon (15-min cron + 60-min health sweep) implemented in Windmill.
